text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You should be able to see it now. That island is the Mejiro family's 
vacation estate.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The whole island?! All right, that means we get to dig for treasure 
anywhere we want!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't you even think about using that shovel!

Team Sirius is taking advantage of the summer break to conduct a 
training camp.

Mejiro McQueen was able to negotiate the use of her family's private 
island for us. However…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! This island really is deserted! Now we can play all day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Come on now, we're not here to play around.

I can't say that the environment doesn't lend itself to the idea, 
though.
choice_data_list: Why don't we take it easy on our first day here?
Why don't we take it easy on our first day here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh… I didn't think I would have you saying it too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it really okay for us to tag along? It's not like we're on your 
team…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't sweat it. They did extend the invite, after all.
The more the merrier. Welcome aboard!
The more the merrier. Welcome aboard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'm glad to be aboard!

And thus, Team Sirius's summer training camp begins with two extra 
Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Okay everyone, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Better speed it up, McQueen. I'm gonna overtake you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey! I'm supposed to be the pace setter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Come on, Dober. You can do better than that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I can't seem to concentrate right now. Or maybe I'm just worried 
about the way everyone sees me…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You don't have anything to worry about! You're cute, you know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't need your flattery! I know more than anyone how unlikable I 
am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship?! What on earth are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What else would I be doing at a beach?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We came all the way out here, so I'm goin' all out on the workout!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: All I see you "going all out on" is playing around!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm gonna pick up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: W-Wait! You're going much too fast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I may have gone too hard back there. And it's only the first 
day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Still, nice going, McQueen. I'm impressed you were able to keep pace 
with Ryan when she sped up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, I couldn't very well let her beat me. Not after what happened at 
the Takarazuka Kinen.

Just a little before the camp started, Mejiro McQueen ran in the 
Takarazuka Kinen, the final major race of the year's first half.

She was the favorite to win, but despite her best efforts, she came 
second to a soaring Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text:
But really, McQueen's running never ceases to amaze me! Both in 
training and in races!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Yeeep. And that's why I joined this team!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh… How much longer is this adulation going to continue?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Deep admiration is usually earned. Shouldn't you be proud of that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, don't be afraid to strut your stuff. When I hear you gettin' all 
those compliments, it puts a smile on my face too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, can't let up if I wanna keep beatin' Mejiro McPopular! I'm 
going again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't think you've gotten a head start!

Time flies when you're running fast. And before we know it, the sun 
begins to set.
Is something wrong? Everyone else has gone inside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? Right. I was just thinking about them all, actually.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not long ago, this team was a shell of its former self, but now, so 
many members call it home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My own running seems to have inspired many. To think that they 
would wish to run alongside me…
You set a fire in their hearts. Kind of like how Oguri Cap inspired us.
You set a fire in their hearts. Kind of like how Oguri Cap inspired us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps… That makes me proud, but also a little embarrassed. It's a 
complicated feeling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For some, winning the spring Tenno Sho and saving a star team would 
be more than enough…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But for me… it's made me realize I have more that I want to 
accomplish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep running. To live up to everyone's expectations by 
winning even more races.

Even more striking than Mejiro McQueen's smile is the determination 
gleaming in her eyes.
choice_data_list: Then I'll be expecting great things, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, and I have no intention of letting you down.
